brand.name: Al Muqeet Technical Services LLC
brand.tagline: Construction, MEP, civil, renovation and maintenance across the UAE

hero.title: Building and maintaining the systems behind every strong space.
hero.sub: Al Muqeet Technical Services LLC delivers construction, MEP works, civil works, renovation, roofing, plumbing, electrical, industrial services, wood works, aluminium works, maintenance, and skilled manpower support across Ajman and the UAE.
hero.overlayCopy: Construction-grade precision, maintenance reliability, and premium technical execution.

about.title: A technical partner for construction, maintenance and specialist works.
about.intro: We support residential, commercial, industrial and facilities clients with a premium service model rooted in safety, speed and workmanship.
about.mission: To deliver dependable technical solutions that keep buildings performing beautifully.
about.vision: To be the most trusted multi-discipline technical services partner in Ajman and across the UAE.
about.quality: Quality is built into materials, sequencing, supervision and final handover.
about.safety: Safety-first planning guides every site visit, method statement and execution step.

services.title: Construction
services.desc: General construction execution for commercial and residential spaces, from foundations to finishes.

services.title: Home Renovation
services.desc: Full or partial renovations with premium finishes, spatial improvements and technical coordination.

services.title: Roofing Services
services.desc: Roof repair, waterproofing, sheet work and protective detailing for long-lasting performance.

services.title: Industrial Services
services.desc: Industrial maintenance and service support aligned with demanding operational environments.

services.title: Plumbing
services.desc: Plumbing installation, repairs and maintenance for clean, efficient water performance.

services.title: MEP Works
services.desc: Coordinated MEP execution for reliable building performance and handover readiness.

services.title: Electrical Works
services.desc: Electrical installation, testing and maintenance for safe and optimized power delivery.

services.title: Civil Works
services.desc: Civil engineering support, concrete works, blockwork and site preparation services.

services.title: Wood Works
services.desc: Built-ins, joinery, fit-out carpentry and precise wood finishing for practical elegance.

services.title: Aluminium Works
services.desc: Aluminium fabrication and installation for windows, partitions, doors and cladding details.

services.title: Technical Maintenance
services.desc: Scheduled and reactive maintenance to keep assets running cleanly and efficiently.

services.title: Skilled Manpower Support
services.desc: Qualified technical manpower support for projects, fit-out and maintenance operations.

process.title: Consultation
process.desc: We study the scope, site conditions, priorities and delivery timeline.

process.title: Planning
process.desc: Our team prepares the execution plan, materials, manpower and sequencing.

process.title: Execution
process.desc: We mobilize skilled teams to deliver precise work with disciplined supervision.

process.title: Quality Handover
process.desc: Final checks, testing and clean handover complete the service cycle.

projects.title: Ajman Residential Renovation
projects.short: Premium refresh of interiors and technical systems.
projects.desc: A clean renovation scope combining flooring, paint, carpentry, electrical adjustments and final detailing.

projects.title: Commercial MEP Upgrade
projects.desc: Coordinated MEP works improving operational efficiency, safety and maintainability.

projects.title: Warehouse Industrial Support
projects.desc: Industrial support work across access, steel fixes, maintenance and site coordination.

projects.title: Roof Waterproofing Works
projects.desc: Roofing and waterproofing intervention designed for long-term performance and reduced maintenance.

projects.title: Corporate Electrical Fit-out
projects.desc: Electrical fit-out for a busy commercial environment with efficient delivery and testing.

projects.title: Joinery and Aluminium Package
projects.desc: Wood and aluminium works delivered with precise fabrication, fit and finish.

careers.desc: Lead daily site execution, sequencing and quality coordination.
Support mechanical, electrical and plumbing installations and maintenance.
Deliver precise wood work and fit-out installations.
Execute safe electrical works and testing support.
